# thoth_governance_pack_rule_versions (Data Source)

Reads all stored rule versions for one compliance pack.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_governance_pack_rule_versions" "hipaa_history" {
  pack_id = "hipaa-minimum-necessary"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pack_id` (String) Pack identifier.

### Read-Only

- `response_json` (String) Full API response payload as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total rule versions returned.
- `versions_json` (String) Rule versions array as JSON.
